sections_cited: section 34A of the Federal Excise Act

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special FERA 85 of 2021 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.22. 2. For orders on CMA No.1252/2021. 3. For hearing of main case. 25.03.2026 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Langah, advocate for the applicant. Matter is pending since 2021 without any progress. Even notice has not been sought / issued till date. On 24.08.2021, following order was passed: “24.08.2021 Mr. Ghulam Murtaza Korai for applicant. Counsel seeks time to reframe questions of law arising out of the impugned order. Adjourned.” Today after five years the same has not been done and applicant’s counsel merely seeks time. It appears that applicant is not interested in the present proceedings. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, the reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 34A of the Federal Excise Act, 2005. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
